established_patterns.deps_struct: actionUpdateDeps pkg/cli/update_actions.go:37. Test-seam-var successor: field-of-funcs, defaultDeps() ctor, tests overwrite fields. R17.

established_patterns.implicit_defer_anti: `defer fn(args)` returning err implicitly discards. Fix: `defer func(){ _ = fn(args) }()`

established_patterns.test_seam_fnvar_anti: `var X = func(...) { return realFn(...) }`. Fix: deps struct. RESOLVED R17.
established_patterns.panic_def: Idiomatic: (a)sync.Once.Do load (b)BUG: prefix (c)init() reg failures (d)defence-in-depth. Linter undifferentiated — #aw_sg17a1.
established_patterns.named_duration: Sleep policies in named time.Duration constants. Ex: APICallCooldown, trialRepoInitDelay. R18 universal in pkg/cli/.
established_patterns.ci_linter_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 POSITIVE selector LINTER_FLAGS="-X -test=false". To enforce new analyzer: append `-name`.
established_patterns.type_assert_safe: Safe contexts for single-value .(T): (a) sync.Map/Pool callbacks (b) Immediately after literal construction (c) go/analysis pass.ResultOf (d) type-switch. Other sites at trust boundaries (API/YAML/JSON) need `, ok`.
